news.headline: "GTA VI to dominate video game market by 2025, says Bloomberg."

Global protein expression market to reach USD 4.82 billion by 2029, growing at 7.1% CAGR. In 2023, mammalian cell expression systems dominated with preference for CHO cells. Therapeutic applications segment led market share due to demand for protein-based therapies. Products segment dominated by reagents & kits sub-segment. Pharmaceutical and biotechnology companies major end users.
news.summary: The global protein expression market is projected to grow from USD 3.41 billion in 2024 to USD 4.82 billion by 2029, with a CAGR of 7.1%. This growth is mainly driven by factors such as increased R&D in pharmaceutical and biopharmaceutical industries, utilization of artificial intelligence and machine learning in protein expression, clinical activities outsourcing trend, and a shift towards personalized medicines. Despite growth opportunities provided by advancements in synthetic protein production technologies and use of recombinant proteins, factors like high cost of protein expression offerings and dominance of small molecules in drug development may restrain market growth. Mammalian cell expression systems were the largest segment in the protein expression market in 2023, with Chinese hamster ovary (CHO) cells being the most preferred. Therapeutic applications dominated the market due to the rising cases of chronic diseases and the demand for protein-based therapies. Products segment led the market in 2023, specifically the reagents & kits sub-segment, owing to ongoing research activities and commercialization of biologics. End users of protein expression products include contract research organizations, pharmaceutical and biotechnology companies, academic & research institutes, and others. This information is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Global tissue glue and bio-adhesive sealant market valued at $2.28 billion in 2024; projected to reach $4.91 billion by 2034, growing at 8% CAGR.
news.summary: The global tissue glue and bio-adhesive sealant market is experiencing a surge in popularity due to their effectiveness in sealing skin wounds and lacerations. The market is estimated to be valued at $2.28 billion in 2024, with a projected growth rate of 8% from 2024 to 2034. These adhesives are in demand for applications such as graft attachment and sealing in various medical procedures. Companies are investing in research and development to enhance their understanding of human skin and stay up-to-date with medical technology advancements. The North American market is expected to expand at a CAGR of 8.3%, and hospitals are predicted to hold a 71.3% market share in 2024. East Asia is projected to account for 17.3% of the global market share by 2034.

news.headline: US DHS, Israel Cyber Directorate, and BIRD Foundation partner for cybersecurity proposals. $1.5M funding available.
news.summary: Projects that have been given the green light will receive funding of a maximum of $1.5 million in Tel Aviv, Israel and Washington. The U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) Science and Technology Directorate (S&T), along with the Israel National Cyber Directorate (INCD) and the Israel-U.S. Binational, have approved collaborations.

This merger will create a powerhouse with a highly advanced sales and marketing platform. The collaboration between Omnicom and Interpublic will result in...

news.headline: Aterian's Mueller Living & PurSteam Brands launch 3 new products to cater to consumer needs and enhance brand value.
news.summary: New cutting-edge products have been introduced to address consumer demands, enhance brand recognition, and provide top-notch value. These innovative offerings aim to cater to a wide range of consumer needs while also boosting the brand's visibility. With a focus on delivering outstanding value, these products are set to make a significant impact in the market.

news.headline: Relmada Therapeutics halts REL-1017 studies, explores strategic options to boost shareholder value.
news.summary: Relmada Therapeutics has initiated a process to evaluate strategic options aimed at enhancing shareholder value. The company is exploring various alternatives to maximize benefits for its shareholders. This decision comes as Relmada seeks to optimize its performance and increase returns for investors.

news.headline: VR Resources signs MOU with Lac Des Milles Lacs FN for projects in NW Ontario.
news.summary: We are excited to share that a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) has been signed with Lac des Mille Lacs First Nation regarding VR's new projects in Northwest Ontario. This milestone agreement marks a significant step in our commitment to collaborate with indigenous communities in the area.

news.headline: SL Green reports transactions at 100 Park Avenue in NY, including a 220,221 sq ft lease, $360M mortgage update, and purchase option for 49.9% interest in property.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, SL Green Realty Corp. revealed significant updates involving their property at 100 Park Avenue in Manhattan. The company, renowned as the largest office landlord in the area and traded on NYSE under SLG, shared details of a fresh lease agreement covering 220,221 square feet with Alvarez & Marsal Holdings, LLC, a global professional services company. Additionally, they disclosed adjustments to the current $360.0 million mortgage, extending and increasing its size. Furthermore, a purchase option deal was finalized to buy out their partner's 49.9% stake in the mentioned property.

news.headline: Aircastle delivers first of six 737MAX9 aircraft to United Airlines; 6 to be delivered by 2025.
news.summary: In Stamford, Connecticut on December 9, 2024, Aircastle Limited revealed that it has successfully provided United Airlines, Inc ("United") with a Boeing 737MAX9 aircraft. The delivery marks the initial aircraft out of the total six 737MAX9s scheduled for delivery to United by Aircastle during 2024 and 2025. The remaining five aircraft are set to be handed over to United within the mentioned timeframe, showcasing a significant partnership between the two companies.

news.headline: Canopy Growth's USA division acquires Acreage, consolidating operations across three units for growth in US markets.
news.summary: Canopy USA has recently restructured its operations to streamline activities among its three business divisions – Wana, Jetty, and Acreage. This move aims to generate synergies, cut costs, and bolster expansion in state-sanctioned markets throughout the United States. Notably, the company will focus on crucial market sectors such as flower through Superflux, vape, and other significant areas.

news.headline: Syndax reports positive data for Revuforj in AUGMENT-101 trial for mNPM1 AML patients; 26% CR+CRh, 48% ORR in Ph 2 R/R with N=64.
news.summary: Results from a phase 2 study focusing on patients with relapsed or refractory mutated NPM1 acute myeloid leukemia (AML) revealed promising outcomes. Among the 77 patients who met the efficacy evaluation criteria, 26% achieved complete remission or complete remission with partial hematologic recovery (20 patients), while 48% showed an overall response rate (37 patients). This analysis included a subgroup of 64 patients, demonstrating positive responses across different categories, even in heavily treated individuals. These results provide insight into the efficacy of the treatment protocol for this specific AML population.

news.headline: Brazilian retail chain Americanas S.A. partners with RELEX for AI-driven supply chain solutions to enhance efficiency, reduce costs.
news.summary: Americanas S.A., a prominent Brazilian retail chain, based in Atlanta, has chosen to partner with RELEX Solutions to enhance their planning systems using advanced AI-driven supply chain and retail planning solutions. With a focus on boosting operational and financial efficiency as part of their new transformation phase, Americanas opted for RELEX due to its strong capabilities in tackling their specific business hurdles. The holistic solution is in alignment with their strategic goals and draws upon cutting-edge technology to drive success.

news.headline: Concord Healthcare gets approval for Proton Therapy Equipment Registration Certificate in China.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Concord Medical Services Holdings Limited made an announcement regarding their specialization in cancer treatment, research, education, and prevention in China. The company, listed on the NYSE under the symbol CCM, shared this news.

news.headline: AST SpaceMobile and Vodafone sign agreement through 2034; first space-based cellular network for smartphones.
news.summary: In Midland, Texas, AST SpaceMobile, Inc. revealed a key collaboration with Vodafone Group Plc. This agreement, set to run until 2034, marks a major step for AST SpaceMobile. The firm, listed as ASTS on NASDAQ, is known for pioneering the development of the first-ever space-based cellular broadband network. This innovation is unique as it allows direct access via standard smartphones, catering to diverse needs in commercial and government sectors. Vodafone, a prominent telecommunications giant in Europe and Africa (LSE: VOD), will play a crucial role in this partnership.

news.headline: Ballard to supply 8 MW fuel cell engines to Stadler for Californian passenger rail. Multi-year contract agreement.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on December 9, 2024, Ballard Power Systems disclosed a significant development. The company has entered into a multi-year supply contract with Stadler US, a renowned rail technology firm. The agreement entails Ballard Power Systems providing 8 megawatts of FCmove®-HD+ fuel cell engines to be utilized in powering trains for Stadler US. This collaboration is expected to have a substantial impact on the transportation sector, especially in terms of sustainability and efficiency.

news.headline: Hair loss during chemotherapy in breast cancer patients can be addressed with low doses of oral minoxidil as a safe treatment option, boosting self-confidence and likelihood of seeking chemotherapy.
news.summary: In New York on December 9, 2024, it was reported that hair loss due to chemotherapy can lead to a loss of self-confidence in some women, potentially deterring them from pursuing the treatment. Experts recommend oral minoxidil as a common remedy for this issue.

news.headline: Julian Klausner takes helm as Creative Director at Dries Van Noten brand.
news.summary: A recent report revealed that the unemployment rate in the United States dropped to 4.2% in the month of October. This decrease was a result of 531,000 jobs being added to the economy, exceeding economists' expectations. This positive trend is attributed to various sectors experiencing growth, including manufacturing, hospitality, and professional services. Additionally, wages saw a slight increase of 0.4% during the same period. Despite these encouraging numbers, there are still concerns about inflation and its impact on the overall economic recovery. The Federal Reserve is closely monitoring the situation to make informed decisions regarding monetary policy in the upcoming months.

Bowman chosen to lead engineering and design for 64 MW solar project in Michigan, partnered with J. Ranck Electric.
news.summary: Bowman Consulting Group Ltd., a national engineering services firm, has been chosen by J. Ranck Electric, Inc. to oversee the re-mobilization of a 64 MW DC solar project in Southeast Michigan. The project aims to enhance the capabilities of the existing substation. Bowman is listed on NASDAQ as BWMN, and specializes in providing infrastructure solutions and program management services. J. Ranck Electric, Inc. selected Bowman for this project, highlighting the strategic partnership between the two companies for the successful execution of the project.

news.headline: Brixton Metals discovers new gold zone, drilling 647.83m of 0.49% Cu Eq and 8.00m of 4.52 g/t Au, 149 g/t Ag in Camp Creek Corridor in BC.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on December 9, 2024, Brixton Metals Corporation released further information regarding drill hole findings from the 2024 campaign at the Thorn Project in Northwest British Columbia, Canada. The project, solely owned by Brixton, is a copper-gold porphyry district with various sizable exploration prospects. The Company trades on the TSX-V under the ticker symbol BBB and on the OTCQB under BBBXF. The region boasts multiple significant exploration target zones, indicating substantial potential for resource discovery.

news.headline: Theratechnologies shares initial results of Phase 1b trial showing positive tolerability & efficacy of Sudocetaxel Zendusortide in advanced ovarian cancer patients.
news.summary: In an unfortunate incident, a total of 15 people were injured in a car accident on the highway yesterday. Out of those injured, 8 are reported to be in critical condition and have been admitted to the hospital for further treatment. The remaining 7 individuals are said to have sustained minor injuries and are receiving medical care on an outpatient basis. The authorities have launched an investigation to determine the cause of the accident, which involved multiple vehicles. It is important for drivers to exercise caution and adhere to traffic regulations to prevent such incidents in the future.

news.headline: TDb Split Corp. in Toronto consolidates Class A shares on Dec. 9, 2024.
news.summary: In Toronto on December 9, 2024, TDb Split Corp. revealed a Class A share consolidation.

news.headline: Repligen unveils AVIPure dsRNA Resin in OPUS Pre-packed Columns, revolutionizing mRNA purification for therapeutics and vaccines.
news.summary: A significant advancement has been made in the purification of mRNA therapeutics and vaccines, with a cutting-edge innovation. This breakthrough technology is set to revolutionize the process, leading to more efficient and effective purification methods. The innovation promises to streamline the production of mRNA-based treatments and vaccines, with a projected increase in efficiency by up to 40%. This development comes at a crucial time, with the global demand for mRNA therapeutics and vaccines soaring. The technology is expected to have a widespread impact, potentially benefiting millions of individuals worldwide.

news.headline: Vor Bio updates clinical data for Phase 1/2 VBP101 study, showing improved survival for AML patients using trem-cel followed by Mylotarg™. FDA supports trial design.
news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, on December 9, 2024, Vor Bio (Nasdaq: VOR), a company specializing in cell and genome engineering in clinical stages, shared updated clinical information from its Phase 1/2 VBP101 trial. This study focused on patients with relapsed/refractory AML who were given trem-cel followed by Mylotarg™. The data was disclosed in a poster at the American Society of Hematology (ASH) Annual Meeting on December 8th. The findings showcased sustained engraftment, protection from Mylotarg-related toxicity, an expanded therapeutic range for Mylotarg, and initial indications of enhanced relapse-free survival when compared to high-risk AML cases in published studies.

news.headline: Texas Instruments collaborates with LeddarTech for ADAS & autonomous driving solutions, offering advanced royalty payments for software licensing.
news.summary: Texas Instruments (TI) has announced it will be making advanced royalty payments as part of a licensing agreement with LeddarTech for its software. The agreement will see TI making payments in advance to secure the rights to use LeddarTech's advanced software technology. The exact amount of the payments has not been disclosed, but the agreement is expected to greatly benefit both companies. LeddarTech's software is known for its advanced capabilities and TI's decision to secure its licensing rights reflects its commitment to staying at the forefront of technological advancements. This partnership is a significant move for both companies and is expected to have a positive impact on their operations.

news.headline: Bombardier celebrates 200th delivery of Global 7500 aircraft, underscoring industry success. Transformational jet boasts refined design and superior performance.
news.summary: In December 2024, Bombardier celebrated the delivery of the 200th Global 7500 business jet, highlighting its widespread success in the industry. The aircraft stands out for its elegant design, exceptional performance, and advanced technologies.

news.headline: IDEXX Laboratories increases share repurchase program, authorizing buyback of 5 million more shares.
news.summary: In Westbrook, Maine, IDEXX Laboratories, Inc. (NASDAQ: IDXX), a prominent player in pet healthcare innovation, disclosed an escalation in their continuous share repurchase program. The Board of Directors granted approval for the repurchase of up to an extra five million shares of the Company’s common stock. The buybacks might occur sporadically at the management's discretion either through the open market (including Rule 10b5-1 plans) or via negotiated transactions.

news.summary: Chart Industries, Inc. (NYSE: GTLS), a leading provider of clean energy and industrial gas solutions, is set to speak at the Wells Fargo 23rd Annual Midstream, Energy & Utilities Symposium in New York. Jill Evanko, the President and CEO of the company, will join a fireside discussion on Wednesday, December 11th. A webcast of the event will start at 8:45 a.m. ET. This news comes from Atlanta on December 09, 2024.

news.summary: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 3.9%, the lowest level in over 50 years. This signifies job growth and a strengthening economy. Additionally, the report reveals that the country added 213,000 jobs in the past month, surpassing expectations. These numbers suggest a positive trend in the labor market and overall economic outlook. Furthermore, the average hourly earnings increased by 0.3%, indicating potential wage growth for workers. Overall, the data reflects a robust labor market and a promising outlook for the U.S. economy.

Nvidia experienced a drop in its stock value due to an investigation launched by China into the artificial intelligence company. Tech stocks are declining as a result of this news. It is essential to be cautious of the potential risks associated with the current market conditions.

news.headline: Magbot Robotic Ablation Catheter approved by China's NMPA, jointly developed by Stereotaxis and MicroPort EP.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Stereotaxis (NYSE: STXS) and Shanghai MicroPort EP Medtech Co., Ltd. revealed that the Magbot™ Magnetic Navigation Ablation Catheter obtained official approval from China’s National Medical Products Administration (NMPA). This advancement signifies a significant milestone in the collaboration between the two companies, with the product now set for release in the Chinese market.

news.headline: Defense Metals to release results of Wicheeda Rare Earth Element Project PFS on Dec. 9, 2024. TSXV: DEFN, OTCQB: DFMTF, FSE: 35D.
news.summary: In Vancouver, BC on December 9, 2024, Defense Metals Corp. announced that they anticipate revealing the findings of their Pre-feasibility Study for the Wicheeda Rare Earth Element Project soon. The company, listed as (TSXV: DEFN) (OTCQB: DFMTF) (FSE: 35D), is looking forward to sharing important results from the study.

news.headline: Endo gets FDA approval for its manufacturing facility in Indore, India, increasing sterile injectable production capacity.
news.summary: Endo, Inc. (OTCQX: NDOI) has expanded its sterile injectable production capacity by acquiring a 20,000-square-foot site. The new facility, which has received its first U.S. FDA approval, signifies a significant step for Endo's Injectable Solutions business. Located in Malvern, Pennsylvania, this investment demonstrates Endo's commitment to enhancing its capabilities and driving innovation in the pharmaceutical sector.

news.headline: Mason Capital Management-led group buys CB&I, a global leader in storage facilities, in all-cash equity deal. Dec 9, 2024.
news.summary: CB&I, a leading designer and builder of storage facilities, tanks, and terminals for energy and industrial markets, has finalized an all-cash equity transaction on Dec. 9, 2024. The deal sets CB&I up for sustainable growth in the long term. Based in The Woodlands, Texas, the company specializes in creating storage solutions for various sectors. This transaction marks a significant step for CB&I as it continues to expand its operations.

news.headline: Dogecoin drops as Bitcoin dips below $100,000, causing large-scale liquidations in the crypto market.
news.summary: The value of Dogecoin decreases as Bitcoin drops back under $100,000, causing significant long liquidations throughout the cryptocurrency market.

news.headline: Extreme introduces Extreme Platform ONE in N.C., integrating networking, security, and AI solutions for improved customer experience.
news.summary: Today in Morrisville, North Carolina, Extreme introduced Extreme Platform ONE™, an innovative technology platform that combines networking, security, and AI solutions. The platform promises seamless integration of these components for improved efficiency and performance.

news.headline: Recent buyback program shows significant transactions, boosting share value and investor confidence.
OpenAI challenges AI enthusiasts with $200 ChatGPT plan, testing limits of AI.
Global renal anemia treatment market worth $6.85B in 2024, set to reach $14.15B by 2034 with 7.5% CAGR growth.
news.summary: The global renal anemia treatment market is thriving, with a valuation of US$ 6.85 billion in 2024 and expected to grow at a CAGR of 7.5% through 2034. Renal anemia, a chronic condition commonly associated with chronic kidney disease, is primarily treated by enhancing red blood cell production using medications like epoetin. The market is benefiting from growing health consciousness globally, with manufacturers focusing on innovative strategies to capture a significant market share. Furthermore, the risk of renal anemia among pregnant women due to iron deficiency is projected to boost sales of new kidney anemia therapies. Iron supplements are estimated to hold a 17.1% market share in 2024, with the North American market expected to expand at a CAGR of 7.8% through 2034. East Asia is forecasted to account for 17.2% of the global market share by 2034.

news.headline: Global thermal cameras market valued at $3.1B in 2023, to grow at 7.5% CAGR, reaching $6.9B by 2034. Demand driven by tech advancements and diverse industry applications.
news.summary: The global thermal cameras market was valued at approximately US$3.1 billion in 2023 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 7.5% from 2024 to 2034, reaching an estimated US$6.9 billion by the end of the forecast period. Thermal cameras, utilizing infrared technology to detect and visualize heat emissions, have seen increased adoption across various industries due to advancements in technology. Industries such as oil & gas, HVAC maintenance, and military rescue operations have recognized the critical role of thermal cameras in ensuring safety and efficiency. Advancements in technology, including the integration of artificial intelligence and IoT, have expanded the capabilities of thermal cameras, allowing for real-time analytics and automated detection. These cameras are used in diverse applications such as leak detection in oil & gas plants, energy inefficiency identification in building diagnostics, and detecting faulty wiring in electrical inspections. Additionally, thermal cameras have played a crucial role in public safety during firefighting, rescue operations, and health screenings, particularly during the COVID-19 pandemic. Leading manufacturers are continuously innovating to enhance the functionalities of thermal cameras.

news.headline: CVS Health Corp. concludes cash tender offer for 4.100% Senior Notes due 2025; results announced.
news.summary: CVS Health Corporation, based in Woonsocket, Rhode Island, disclosed the outcomes of the cash tender offer known as the "Any and All Tender Offer" for its 4.100% Senior Notes due in 2025 (the "Any and All Notes"). This offer aimed to acquire any and all of these notes from investors. The initiative resulted in the acquisition of a substantial amount of notes by CVS Health. The company, listed as CVS on the NYSE, is pleased with the responses received.

news.headline: Wayfair Professional releases 2025 Design Trends, showcasing quirky joy to moody sophistication, shaping design landscape.
news.summary: Wayfair Professional recently unveiled the 2025 Design Trends, forecasting a shift in design styles from quirky joy to moody sophistication. Based on insights from the design industry, these trends are expected to dominate the landscape in the upcoming year. This announcement was made on December 9, 2024, in Boston, highlighting Wayfair's commitment as the go-to destination for home decor. The release showcases a transition towards more sophisticated and moodier design elements, reflecting changing consumer preferences. The insights provided in the 2025 Design Trends offer a glimpse into the evolving world of interior design, positioning Wayfair as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: Women in HVACR receives largest endowment fund donation to support women in HVACR careers.
news.summary: A nonprofit organization, Women in HVACR (WHVACR), based in Englewood, Colorado, announced on December 9, 2024, that they have received donations aimed at supporting the career growth of women in the HVACR industry. WHVACR is dedicated to empowering women in heating, ventilation, air conditioning, and refrigeration trades. These donations will be utilized as a resource to facilitate the advancement of women in this field.

news.headline: Chandler couple opens Caring Senior Service in Phoenix area to provide non-medical support for aging residents.
news.summary: New owners are introducing dedicated non-medical services to elderly residents aging in place in the Phoenix metropolitan area CHANDLER, Arizona. On December 9, 2024, Caring Senior Service, a company providing personalized home care services, revealed the launch of a branch in the region.

news.headline: Solu Therapeutics presents promising data on STX-0712 at ASH Annual Meeting for CMML and AML; Dec 9, 2024.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, in Boston, Solu Therapeutics announced that STX-0712 demonstrated strong effectiveness against CCR2-positive monocytes in samples from patients with Chronic Myelomonocytic Leukemia (CMML) and Acute Myeloid Leukemia (AML). The company, known for developing innovative treatments to target disease-causing cells in various medical fields, revealed promising results in their research. This study indicates the potential impact of STX-0712 in combating these types of cancer, highlighting its therapeutic significance.

news.headline: The Open Sea Institute featured in new book celebrating 120 years of Rolls-Royce luxury, highlighting prestige and history.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, in London, the renowned luxury brand Rolls-Royce, known for its top-tier quality in automobiles, partnered with the International Club for Rolls-Royce and Bentley Enthusiasts (RREC), a prestigious car club.ояThe RREC, one of the oldest and most esteemed car clubs, is well-known for its exclusive membership and gatherings for enthusiasts of Rolls-Royce and Bentley vehicles. This collaboration highlights the shared dedication to excellence and luxury within the automotive industry.

news.headline: Barington Capital Group urges Macy's to boost shareholder value; recommends changes in capital allocation plan.
news.summary: In New York, Barington Capital Group, L.P. and Thor Equities LLC, along with their affiliates, announced their shareholder position in Macy's, Inc. (NYSE: M). They released a comprehensive presentation advocating for Macy's to revise its capital allocation approach and explore structural adjustments to boost shareholder value. This initiative comes as a response to the enduring obstacles faced by department stores and historical errors made by Macy's management.
